title: lastrea rivulariformis
intro: Lastrea rivulariformis, also known as the rivularis fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The rivularis fern is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Lastrea rivulariformis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or capsules for its herbal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
